name: ENNIS, INC.
summary: Ennis, Inc. (formerly Ennis Business Forms, Inc.) is a Texas-organized trade printer founded in 1909, manufacturing a broad range of printed business products including business forms, pressure-seal forms, labels, tags, envelopes, and presentation folders. Operating 56 manufacturing plants across 20 U.S. states, Ennis sells approximately 94% custom and semi-custom products primarily through independent distributors, commercial printers, direct mail companies, payroll software companies, and advertising agencies throughout the United States.
